changes.motivation: Helm's upgrade with `atomic = true` used optimistic concurrency (resourceVersion) when replacing the `ebs-csi-controller` PodDisruptionBudget. If any controller (e.g. Kyverno, VPA) modified the PDB between Helm's read and write, Kubernetes rejected the update with a 409 conflict, causing the entire release to roll back and fail intermittently.
changes.summary: In `packages/infrastructure/kube_aws_ebs_csi/main.tf`: disabled the Helm chart's built-in PDB via `controller.podDisruptionBudget.enabled = false`, and added a `kubectl_manifest "pdb_controller"` resource with `server_side_apply = true` and `force_conflicts = true` to manage the PDB through Kubernetes server-side apply, which uses field ownership instead of resourceVersion and is immune to the race condition.

changes.motivation: The `Generate Terraform Reference` pre-commit hook automatically regenerated the module docs to reflect the new `kubectl_manifest.pdb_controller` resource added to the module.
changes.summary: Auto-generated update to `packages/website/src/content/docs/main/modules/kube_aws_ebs_csi/reference.mdx` by the pre-commit hook.

changes.motivation: The website package was missing `@types/html-minifier-terser`, causing TypeScript typecheck errors in the compress plugin that blocked commits.
changes.summary: Added `@types/html-minifier-terser` to `packages/website/package.json` and ran `bun i` to resolve the pre-existing typecheck failure.

problems: The `Generate Terraform Reference` pre-commit hook modifies tracked files and causes the commit to fail with 'files were modified by following hooks', requiring the user to stage the auto-generated file and re-run the commit. This workflow is non-obvious and not documented anywhere visible in the repository.

The website had a pre-existing TypeScript typecheck failure (`@types/html-minifier-terser` missing) unrelated to the changes being made, but it blocked every commit attempt. Missing dev-dependency type declarations should be caught earlier (e.g. in CI or at install time) rather than surfacing only during pre-commit hooks.
